items.title: Investors Rotate Into Cyclical Sectors
items.description: The first full trading week of 2026 saw a shift in market leadership. After several weeks of narrow gains driven by mega-cap growth, investors rotated decisively towards cyclical sectors.

items.title: Wall Street S&P 500 targets reveal hidden trap for SPY investors
items.description: Wall Street analysts are currently projecting a bullish march for the S&P 500 in 2026, but buried within these rosy targets lies a hidden trap for SPY investors. Having navigated these markets for over 30 years, I've learned that when the consensus speaks in absolutes, history usually has a ...

items.title: Why Smart Money Is Looking Overseas for Bank Stocks
items.description: International stocks continue to beat U.S. equities, especially in the banking sector. Consider these 2 international bank stocks to diversify your portfolio.

items.title: 5 Considerations In The Upcoming CPI Report
items.description: Stock indices rallied despite limited CPI data last month; since then, small-caps and Dow are outperforming tech into early 2026.
